hero.name: BC Consultores
hero.title: Accounting and financial advisory for real businesses
hero.tagline: We help SMEs and startups that need to organize their numbers and make decisions with clarity.

about.description: Business Case was founded with the purpose of helping medium and large companies professionalize their management, streamline processes, and scale results with human leadership. We believe that true change is not only measured in numbers — it is also measured in thriving teams, sustainable cultures, and systems that keep working when the leader is no longer there.
about.description2: Founded by Federico Cuadra, a Public Accountant (UBA) with over 20 years of experience leading financial and operational transformations at companies like Cervecería Quilmes and Cervepar. Today, Federico helps companies looking to scale with order, clarity, and purpose, applying real and measurable solutions from his hands-on experience.

services.sectionSubtitle: We work to give you control over your business. We help you keep your accounting up to date, gain clarity on profitability, and make decisions based on real numbers.

items.title: Accounting & Reporting
items.description: Clear balance sheets and reports that make sense. Organized accounting information for better decision-making.

items.title: Tax Advisory
items.description: Tax planning and filing of tax returns. Fiscal optimization tailored to your situation.

items.title: Preventive Management
items.description: We project taxes to avoid surprises. We anticipate fiscal scenarios and detect risks early.

items.title: Payroll Administration
items.description: Salaries, payroll, and everything related to your team. Complete management of labor obligations and social charges.

items.title: Financial Management
items.description: Clear indicators to know if you're on track. We improve metrics like EBITDA, cash flow, and productivity.

items.title: Sustainable Processes
items.description: We identify improvements to make your operations more efficient. We optimize internal processes with impact measurement.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: We support transformations to organize and grow. We design efficient and scalable structures.

experience.founderBio: Public Accountant (UBA) with over 20 years of experience in the corporate world — 15 of them at Cervecería Quilmes — where he led strategic transformations in key areas such as taxes, management control, and financial planning. He has managed teams in multicultural contexts and across different countries in the region.
experience.originText: Business Case was born from the conviction that companies need more than an accountant: they need a strategic partner who understands their business from the inside. We combine strategic vision, closeness, and real experience to support companies looking to scale with order and purpose.

allies.sectionSubtitle: We have a network of accountants specialized in taxation to provide a technical and up-to-date service, adapted to each company's needs.

members.name: Daniela Monteagudo
members.specialty: Tax advisory for SMEs across multiple sectors.

members.name: Matías Denis
members.specialty: Accounting processes, payroll management, and tax compliance.

posts.sectionSubtitle: Articles and updates on accounting, tax, and financial topics.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Need accounting or financial advisory? Don't hesitate to reach out.
